## Purpose

Describe the research workflow or defect addressed by this change.

## Statistical and privacy impact

- [ ] Statistical assumptions are unchanged, or changes are documented.
- [ ] No patient-level, confidential, or restricted data are included.
- [ ] Output schema changes are documented.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests cover the change.
- [ ] R CMD check passes locally.
- [ ] NEWS.md is updated when behavior changes.
